title: Senior Doctor - Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates:
Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates!
